---
title: "Trucktrack: how"
author: "Jesse Tweedle"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
lightbox: auto
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![1](figures/shapes%20at%2026-05-02%2013.07.34.png){group="how"}

![2](figures/shapes%20at%2026-05-02%2013.14.17.png){group="how"}

![3](figures/shapes%20at%2026-05-02%2013.20.04.png){group="how"}

![4](figures/shapes%20at%2026-05-02%2013.32.13.png){group="how"}
:::
